---
title: "Task guides"
description: "Goal-oriented recipes. Each is standalone and links into the reference."
order: 0
listing:
  id: guides
  type: table
  contents:
    - ingest-10x.qmd
    - ingest-spatial.qmd
    - process-filter.qmd
    - process-many-samples.qmd
    - integrate.qmd
    - annotate.qmd
    - qc-report.qmd
    - gpu.qmd
    - spatial-niches.qmd
    - turnkey.qmd
    - tune-resources.qmd
  fields: [title, categories, description]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Guide"
    categories: "Package"
    description: "What it covers"
  sort: false
  categories: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---

Pick a task. Each guide is standalone and links into the
[reference](../reference/index.qmd). Filter by package using the tags below.

:::{#guides}
:::
